case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. FLAVIO CARLOS DE SIQUEIRA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DE SIQUEIRA, FLAVIO CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSEFINA FLORES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE SIQUEIRA, FLAVIO CARLOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE SIQUEIRA, FLAVIO CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE SIQUEIRA, FLAVIO CARLOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
